common.name: Name
common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sessions.subtitle: Sign in to your RESTai account
sessions.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
sessions.totpSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
sessions.passwordAgeMessage: Your password is {{days}} days old. Please change it soon.

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your RESTai platform
dashboard.noProjectsDesc: Projects are where RAG, agent, and block flows live. Create one to start tracking conversations, costs, and quality on this dashboard.
dashboard.authSecretWeak: Security warning: the RESTAI_AUTH_SECRET environment variable is weak or matches a known default. Rotate it to a long random value and restart the server. Existing sessions will need to re-login.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Your RAG, agent, and block projects
projects.emptyMessage: Create your first project to get started.

clone.title: Clone Project
clone.helper: Settings, eval datasets, and prompt versions will be cloned.

template.saveIntro: Snapshot this project's system prompt + options as a reusable template. The live project is not affected.
template.name: Template name
template.descHelper: Shown in the library list — explain what this template is for.
template.private: Private — only you can see and use it
template.team: Team — members of this project's team
template.public: Public — anyone on this RESTai instance

library.title: Project Library
library.subtitle: Browse shared projects. Clone any project to customize it for your needs.
library.communityTemplatesDesc: Reusable project starter packs — instantiate one into a new project in any of your teams. Save your own from any project's "Save as template" button.
library.markPublicHint: Mark a project as "Shared" in its settings to make it appear here.

gallery.chooseSubtitle: Start with a pre-configured project or build from scratch
gallery.scratchDesc: Create a blank project and configure everything manually
gallery.publishedDesc: Saved from existing projects. Clicking one creates a fresh project seeded from the snapshot.

unsavedChanges.title: Discard unsaved changes?
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved edits in this project. Leaving now will discard them.

general.systemPromptHint: Instructions that shape the agent's behaviour
general.censorshipHint: Returned when the agent can't find a good answer
general.memoryBankWarning: The Memory Bank shares a compressed summary of every conversation in this project with every other conversation. Any user with access to this project will see the agent reference summarized context derived from other users' chats. Do not enable this option for projects that handle confidential per-user data.
general.browserAllowedHint: Comma-separated hostnames the browser may visit. Empty = unrestricted.

knowledge.kHint: Number of chunks retrieved per query

evals.clickHint: Click a dataset to manage its test cases.
evals.noDatasets: No datasets yet. Create one to start evaluating.
evals.name: Name
evals.noCases: No test cases yet. Add questions to evaluate your project.
evals.question: Question
evals.noRuns: No runs yet. Select a dataset and click the play button to start.
evals.expectedHelp: Provide a ground truth answer to enable the 'correctness' metric
evals.selectMetrics: Select which metrics to evaluate. Each test case will be scored per metric.
evals.answerRelevancy: Answer Relevancy — Is the answer relevant to the question?
evals.faithfulness: Faithfulness — Is the answer grounded in retrieved context? (RAG only)
evals.correctness: Correctness — Does the answer match the expected answer?
evals.confirmDeleteDataset: Delete this dataset and all its test cases?

guardAnalytics.title: Guard Analytics
guardAnalytics.noData: No guard data available. Configure input or output guards on this project to start tracking.

ide.title: Block IDE
ide.subtitleWithAi: Visually compose your block project. Use "Generate with AI" to get a starting workspace.
ide.subtitle: Visually compose your block project.
ide.dialogHelp: Describe in plain English what this block project should do. The system LLM will generate a starter workspace you can then edit.
ide.placeholder: e.g. "Classify user messages as billing, technical, or sales, then forward each to the right sub-project"
ide.warning: This replaces the current workspace. Save your existing blocks first if you need them.
ide.workspaceGenerated: Workspace generated — review and save when ready

knowledge.ingestHelp: PDF / DOCX / CSV / XLSX / TXT. Processed asynchronously by the bulk_ingest cron.

security.inputGuardHint: Guard project that validates user questions before the main project runs
security.rateLimitHint: Maximum requests per minute. Leave empty for unlimited.
security.redactInferenceLogs: Redact sensitive data in inference logs

integrations.telegramTokenHint: Paste the token from @BotFather to connect this project to Telegram
integrations.webhookUrlHelp: Configure this URL in Meta Business Suite → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhooks.

secrets.title: Project Secrets
secrets.subtitle: Encrypted credentials the Agentic Browser can use without exposing them to the LLM
secrets.name: Name

mobile.title: Mobile integration
mobile.subtitle: Pair Android/iOS clients with this project via QR code
mobile.intro: Scan the QR code with the RESTai mobile app (Android today, more platforms coming) to get a read-only chat into this project. The app only ever uses chat mode (streaming). Toggle off or regenerate to revoke every paired phone at once.
mobile.hint: Show this QR to as many phones as you like — every one of them shares the same read-only key. Click <1>Regenerate key</1> to invalidate every paired phone in one go.
mobile.offMessage: Mobile integration is off. No API key exists for mobile apps on this project.
mobile.qrHint: Scan this QR code with the RESTai mobile app.

routines.title: Routines
routines.subtitle: Scheduled messages that auto-fire on this project
routines.name: Name

chat.attachFiles: Attach files — images go to the vision model, the rest land in /home/user/uploads/ for the terminal tool
chat.getStarted: Send a message to get started.
chat.guardHit: This question hit the prompt guard.
chat.ragNoSources: No sources found. Try decreasing the score cutoff.

error.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please log in again.
error.budgetExhausted: Project budget exhausted. Contact an admin to top up.
error.forbidden: You don't have permission to use this project.
error.notFound: Project not found or has been deleted.
error.tooLarge: Your message or attachment is too large.
error.invalid: The request didn't match the project's expected shape.
error.rateLimit: Rate limit exceeded — wait a moment and try again.
error.internal: The project hit an error. Check the server logs or try again.
error.overloaded: The service is temporarily overloaded. Please retry in a moment.
error.timeout: The request timed out. The LLM took too long to respond.
error.generic: Error: the request failed. Check your connection and try again.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Platform users, their roles, and project access
users.emptyMessage: Platform users show up here. Add a first admin or teammate to get started.

basic.title: Basic Information
basic.restrictedHelp: Restricted users can only chat with existing projects. They cannot create, edit, or delete projects, ingest data, or use direct access endpoints.
basic.languageHelp: Interface language. Applied after you save changes.

password.title: Password
password.twoFactorAlert: 2FA is enabled. Enter a code from your authenticator app to confirm the password change.
password.recMin: 8 characters long - the more, the better
password.recSymbol: At least one number, symbol, or whitespace character
password.twoFactorRequired: 2FA code is required to change your password

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security using a TOTP authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
twoFactor.enforced: 2FA is enforced by the administrator for all local users.
twoFactor.step1: 1. Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
twoFactor.recoveryAlert: Store these codes securely. Each code can only be used once to log in if you lose your authenticator.
twoFactor.step3: 3. Confirm with a code and your password

deleteAccount.title: Delete Your Account
deleteAccount.description: When you delete your account, you lose access to everything,
deleteAccount.confirm: Confirm that I want to delete my account.

userTeams.title: Teams
userTeams.noTeams: This user is not a member of any team.
userTeams.noAdmin: Not an admin of any team.

newPage.title: Create a new user
newPage.subtitle: Add a user to the platform. Set their credentials and permission level.
newPage.adminHelp: Full access to all projects, users, teams, and platform settings.
newPage.restrictedHelp: User can only chat with existing projects. No creating, editing, ingesting, or direct access.
newPage.privateHelp: Restrict this user to on-premise LLMs and embeddings — no external provider calls.
newPage.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.quotaInputHelper: Leave empty or set 0 for unlimited. Counter resets on the 1st of next month.
apiKeys.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API key?
apiKeys.restrictHelp: Leave empty for access to all your projects
apiKeys.readOnlyCheckbox: Read-only (can query but not modify projects)
apiKeys.saveKeyWarn: This is the only time the full key will be shown. Copy it now.

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Groups of users with shared LLM, embedding, and project access
teams.emptyMessage: Teams scope LLM access, budgets, and project membership. Create one to start organizing users.

edit.name: Team Name
edit.adminsHelp: Team admins can manage team settings and members
edit.inviteHelp: Send an invitation to a user by username. They will be able to accept or decline.
edit.projectsHelp: Projects assigned to this team will be accessible by all team members
edit.noImageGen: No image generators available. GPU may not be enabled on this instance.
edit.noAudioGen: No audio generators available. GPU may not be enabled on this instance.
edit.brandingHelp: Customize the platform appearance for team members. Leave fields empty to use platform defaults.
edit.appNameHelp: Overrides the platform name in the sidebar
edit.logoUrlHelp: URL or data:image/... URI for the sidebar logo
edit.primaryColorHelp: Hex color for header and primary elements
edit.secondaryColorHelp: Hex color for accents and secondary elements
edit.welcomeHelp: Displayed on the landing page for team members

view.notFound: Team not found or you don't have permission to view it.
view.noProjects: No projects assigned to this team
view.noLlms: No LLMs assigned to this team

llms.subtitle: Large language model providers available to your teams
llms.emptyMessage: Register at least one LLM (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, etc.) before your teams can create chat or RAG projects.

edit.name: Name
edit.modelsNone: No models found. Check the API base URL and API key in the options below.
edit.contextHelp: Maximum number of tokens the LLM can process

info.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the LLM {{name}}?

chooser.title: Add a new LLM
chooser.subtitle: Connect a language model to your platform. Pick the fastest path based on where your model is hosted.
chooser.ollamaDesc: Connect to a local or remote Ollama instance and pull its installed models in one click.
chooser.manualDesc: Configure any supported provider — OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, Bedrock, Gemini, and more.

interactive.title: Choose a provider
interactive.subtitle: Pick the provider that hosts your model. We'll configure the right fields automatically.
interactive.name: Name
interactive.rawHelp: Auto-updated from the fields above. Click values to edit, or use +/- to add/remove custom options.

embeddings.title: Embeddings
embeddings.subtitle: Embedding models used by RAG projects
embeddings.emptyMessage: Register an embedding model to enable RAG projects. OpenAI, HuggingFace, and Ollama variants all work.

info.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the embedding {{name}}?

chooser.title: Add a new Embedding
chooser.subtitle: Connect an embedding model to power your RAG knowledge retrieval. Pick the fastest path based on where your model is hosted.
chooser.ollamaDesc: Connect to a local or remote Ollama instance and pull its installed embedding models in one click.
chooser.manualDesc: Configure any supported embedding provider (HuggingFace, OpenAI, LangChain, Ollama, etc.).

interactive.title: Choose a provider
interactive.subtitle: Pick the provider that hosts your embedding model. We'll configure the right fields automatically.
interactive.name: Name
interactive.rawHelp: Auto-updated from the fields above. Click values to edit, or use +/- to add/remove custom options.

proxy.title: AI Proxy
proxy.noKeys: No keys yet — click "New Key" to create one
proxy.copyReveal: Your new key has been created. Copy it now — it won't be shown again.

direct.title: Direct Access
direct.subtitle: Access LLMs, embeddings, image generators, and audio transcription directly via OpenAI-compatible API endpoints. Use your API key for authentication (Bearer token or Basic auth).
direct.baseUrlLine: Base URL: {{url}} — manage your API keys in your user profile.
direct.chatDesc: OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint. Supports both streaming (stream: true) and non-streaming responses. Works with any LLM your team has access to.
direct.embeddingsDesc: OpenAI-compatible embeddings endpoint. Generate vector embeddings for text inputs. Supports single or batch input. Works with any embedding model your team has access to.
direct.imagesDesc: OpenAI-compatible image generation endpoint. Supports local GPU-based generators (e.g. Stable Diffusion, Flux) and external providers (DALL-E, Imagen). Returns base64-encoded images or data URLs.
direct.audioDesc: OpenAI-compatible audio transcription endpoint. Upload an audio file (mp3, wav, etc.) and receive the transcribed text. Non-mp3 files are automatically converted using ffmpeg. Supports language specification for improved accuracy.
direct.noLlms: No LLMs available. Ask your team admin to grant LLM access to your team.
direct.noEmbeddings: No embedding models available. Ask your team admin to grant embedding model access to your team.
direct.noImage: No image generators available. Ask your team admin to grant image generator access, or GPU may not be enabled on this instance.
direct.noAudio: No audio generators available. Ask your team admin to grant audio generator access, or GPU may not be enabled on this instance.

classifier.title: Classifier
classifier.textPlaceholder: Enter the text you want to classify…
classifier.enterBoth: Enter text and at least one label
classifier.inputHint: Enter text and labels, then click Classify

speechGen.title: Speech-to-Text
speechGen.subtitle: Local Whisper / WhisperX workers + external transcription providers (OpenAI, Google, Deepgram, AssemblyAI)

dialog.localInfo: Local model from restai/audio/workers/{{name}}.py. You can toggle enabled, set privacy + description, and assign to teams. Provider + options come from the worker module.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.nameHelp: URL-safe identifier — letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, underscores
dialog.apiKeyHelp: Leave as ******** to keep the existing key
dialog.baseUrlHelp: Leave empty for OpenAI proper. Set for Groq / Together / vLLM / self-hosted.
dialog.localCannotDelete: Local models cannot be deleted. Disable instead.

tools.title: Agent Tools
tools.subtitle: Built-in tools available for agent projects to use during conversations.
tools.info: This is the global catalogue of built-in tools shipped with RESTai. Each agent project can extend this list with its own tools — either by connecting to MCP servers (configured in the project's edit page) or by defining agent-created tools on the fly via the create_tool builtin. Project-specific tools only show up in that project's chat, not here.

imageGen.title: Image Generators
imageGen.subtitle: Local workers + external providers (OpenAI, Google) — admins manage credentials per row

dialog.localInfo: Local generator from restai/image/workers/{{name}}.py. You can toggle enabled, set privacy + description, and assign to teams. Provider + options come from the worker module.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.nameHelp: URL-safe identifier — letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, underscores
dialog.apiKeyHelp: Leave as ******** to keep the existing key
dialog.baseUrlHelp: Leave empty for OpenAI proper. Set for Together / Groq / vLLM / self-hosted.
dialog.localCannotDelete: Local generators cannot be deleted. Disable instead.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.subtitle: Pending invitations to teams and projects

fields.systemLlmHelp: Backing model for platform AI helpers (Smart Search, Prompt Generator, Blockly generator). Leave empty to disable those features.

helpers.systemLlm: LLM used by the platform for internal tasks (prompt helpers, summarization, etc). Leave empty to disable.
helpers.retention: Auto-delete logs older than this. 0 = keep forever.
helpers.dockerTimeout: Remove containers after this many seconds of inactivity
helpers.browserImage: Playwright image. Needs Chromium + playwright.sync_api preinstalled.
helpers.browserTimeout: Unused containers are reaped after this.
helpers.allowedDomains: Comma-separated email domains, or * for all
helpers.autoTeam: Auto-created SSO users will be added to this team

telemetry.description: RESTai sends anonymized, aggregate usage statistics to help the open-source project understand adoption and prioritize development. No personal data, prompts, answers, or API keys are ever sent — only counts (projects, users, LLMs) and feature flags.
telemetry.optOut: To opt out, set the ANONYMIZED_TELEMETRY=false environment variable and restart the server.
